docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $12,500.00 FILED BY NICHOLSON, TODD AS TO DEFENDANT TENDERLOIN NEIGHBOTHOOD DEV CORP ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-27-2026 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-27-2026 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NICHOLSON, TODD RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TENDERLOIN NEIGHBOTHOOD DEV CORP $12,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $12,515.00, DEFENDANT FAILED TO APPEAR. SERVICE IS VALID (CCP SECTION 416.10 (B). PLAINTIFF PROVED LOSS OF ENJOYMENT OF RENTAL UNIT AND PROPERTY DAMAGE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FELICIA ROBINSON FILED BY DEFENDANT TENDERLOIN NEIGHBOTHOOD DEV CORP

ORDER ON REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER AND ANSWER (SC-105A) DIENIED*** BY REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF. THE COURT HAS SET A HEARING ON THE MOTION. YOU MAY APPEAR AND MAKE YOUR ARGUMENT. SIGNED BY VISITING JUDGE CARRIE ZEPEDA
STIPULATION TO ALLOW THE CASE TO BE HEARD BY A JUDGE PRO TEM. FILED BY NICHOLSON, TODD
MOTION TO VACATE JUGEMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT TENDERLOIN NEIGHBOTHOOD DEV CORP HEARING SET FOR JUN-23-2026 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SC-105 REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER AND ANSWER FILED BY PLAINTIFF NICHOLSON, TODD

MOTION TO VACATE JUGEMENT FILED BY IS GRANTED. CONTINUED TO JUL-27-2026 AT 3:30 PM IN 506 FOR TRIAL. PLAINTIFF TODD NICHOLSON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT TNDC IS PRESENT, APPEARING IS FELICIA ROBINSON. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MURLENE J RANDLE; CLERK: N.WEBB. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF NICHOLSON, TODD

SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF NICHOLSON, TODD AS TO DEFENDANT TENDERLOIN NEIGHBOTHOOD DEV CORP

DEFENDANT TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATON IS NOT PRESENT. THE COURT FINDS PROOF OF SERVICE IS SOUND. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JAMES CHANG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
